note.zh: 在 Open Code 中以 DeepSeek-V4-Pro（High 思考配额）一次生成。本页为修复与优化版：修正了可能导致渲染报错的小 bug，并微调了表壳和机身金属材质，其余生成逻辑和视觉设计未作改动。
note.en: Generated in one shot by DeepSeek-V4-Pro inside Open Code with High effort. This version is a fixed and optimized build: fixed a minor rendering bug and fine-tuned the metal materials of the watch case, with the rest of the generation logic and visual design untouched.
